---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest an addition or change to mojo-template
---

## Problem

What are you trying to express in a template that the engine doesn't
support today? (Note the out-of-scope list in the README — inheritance,
includes, macros, and custom filters are deliberately deferred.)

## Proposed syntax / API

Sketch the template syntax or the Mojo API you'd expect to use.

## Alternatives considered

Any workarounds you're using now, or other approaches you considered.
